description: Hand-authored synthetic IOI-style sentence completions with the indirect object's name as the final behavior token.

documents.text: Alice and Bob were sorting books in the library, and Alice gave the heavy atlas to Bob
Maria and Daniel checked the mailbox together before Maria sent the invitation to Daniel
Priya and Omar walked into the office after Priya handed the spare keys to Omar
Liam and Nora looked through the album, and Liam showed the old picture to Nora
